---
title: "Episode Explorer"
page-layout: full
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)

boundary102 <- readRDS(
  "data/boundary102.rds"
)

episodes <- readRDS(
  "data/episodes.rds"
)

selected_tag <- "013EFFF1"

episodes <-
  episodes[
    episodes$tag_id == selected_tag,
  ]

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Keep only boundaries associated with episode sites
# ------------------------------------------------------------

episode_sites <-
  unique(
    na.omit(
      episodes$state[
        episodes$state != "outside"
      ]
    )
  )

boundary102 <-
  boundary102[
    boundary102$SiteName %in% episode_sites,
  ]

boundary102$SiteStatus_map <-
  ifelse(
    !is.na(boundary102$SiteStatus) &
      boundary102$SiteStatus == "Active",
    "Active",
    "Other"
  )

site_status_pal <-
  colorFactor(
    palette = c(
      "#984EA3",
      "#BDBDBD"
    ),
    domain = c(
      "Active",
      "Other"
    )
  )

behavior_pal <-
  colorFactor(
    palette = c(
      "#E69F00",
      "#0072B2",
      "#009E73"
    ),
    domain = c(
      "migration",
      "premigration",
      "winter"
    )
  )

episode_type_pal <-
  colorFactor(
    palette = c(
      foray = "#E41A1C",
      visit = "#984EA3"
    ),
    domain = c(
      "foray",
      "visit"
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Boundary geometry
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Apply the same small south adjustment used for detections.

boundary102 <-
  st_transform(
    boundary102,
    32610
  )

geom_boundary <-
  st_geometry(boundary102) + c(0, -25)

st_geometry(boundary102) <-
  st_set_crs(
    geom_boundary,
    32610
  )

boundary102 <-
  st_transform(
    boundary102,
    4326
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Episode data
# ------------------------------------------------------------

episodes_df <-
  if(inherits(episodes, "sf")) {
    st_drop_geometry(episodes)
  } else {
    episodes
  }

episodes_df <-
  episodes_df[
    is.finite(episodes_df$start_x) &
      is.finite(episodes_df$start_y) &
      is.finite(episodes_df$end_x) &
      is.finite(episodes_df$end_y),
  ]

episodes_df$row_id <-
  seq_len(
    nrow(episodes_df)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Correct episode start geometry
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Rebuild starts from start_x / start_y as EPSG:32612,
# transform to EPSG:32610,
# apply same c(0, -25) adjustment,
# then transform to WGS84 for Leaflet.

episode_starts_32610 <-
  st_as_sf(
    episodes_df,
    coords = c(
      "start_x",
      "start_y"
    ),
    crs = 32612,
    remove = FALSE
  ) |>
  st_transform(
    32610
  )

geom_start <-
  st_geometry(episode_starts_32610) + c(0, -25)

st_geometry(episode_starts_32610) <-
  st_set_crs(
    geom_start,
    32610
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Correct episode end geometry
# ------------------------------------------------------------

episode_ends_32610 <-
  st_as_sf(
    episodes_df,
    coords = c(
      "end_x",
      "end_y"
    ),
    crs = 32612,
    remove = FALSE
  ) |>
  st_transform(
    32610
  )

geom_end <-
  st_geometry(episode_ends_32610) + c(0, -25)

st_geometry(episode_ends_32610) <-
  st_set_crs(
    geom_end,
    32610
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Extract corrected coordinates
# ------------------------------------------------------------

start_coords <-
  st_coordinates(
    episode_starts_32610
  )

end_coords <-
  st_coordinates(
    episode_ends_32610
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build dashed transition lines between consecutive episodes
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# These connect the end of one episode to the start of the next
# episode for the same tag_id, regardless of date.

episode_coords <-
  episodes_df |>
  mutate(
    start_X = start_coords[, "X"],
    start_Y = start_coords[, "Y"],
    end_X = end_coords[, "X"],
    end_Y = end_coords[, "Y"]
  )

transition_df <-
  episode_coords |>
  arrange(
    tag_id,
    start_time
  ) |>
  group_by(
    tag_id
  ) |>
  mutate(
    next_start_X = lead(start_X),
    next_start_Y = lead(start_Y),
    next_state = lead(state),
    next_episode_type = lead(episode_type),
    next_start_time = lead(start_time),
    next_merged_episode_id = lead(merged_episode_id)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(
    is.finite(end_X),
    is.finite(end_Y),
    is.finite(next_start_X),
    is.finite(next_start_Y)
  )

transition_line_geom <-
  st_sfc(
    lapply(
      seq_len(nrow(transition_df)),
      function(i) {
        st_linestring(
          matrix(
            c(
              transition_df$end_X[i],
              transition_df$end_Y[i],
              transition_df$next_start_X[i],
              transition_df$next_start_Y[i]
            ),
            ncol = 2,
            byrow = TRUE
          )
        )
      }
    ),
    crs = 32610
  )

transition_lines <-
  st_sf(
    transition_df,
    geometry = transition_line_geom
  ) |>
  st_transform(
    4326
  )

transition_lines$popup_text <-
  paste0(
    "<b>Between Episodes</b>",
    "<br><b>Tag:</b> ",
    transition_lines$tag_id,

    "<br><b>Sex:</b> ",
    transition_lines$Sex,

    "<br><b>Tag Site:</b> ",
    transition_lines$TagSiteName,

    "<br><b>From Episode:</b> ",
    transition_lines$merged_episode_id,

    "<br><b>From Site:</b> ",
    transition_lines$state,

    "<br><b>From Type:</b> ",
    transition_lines$episode_type,

    "<br><b>End Time:</b> ",
    transition_lines$end_time,

    "<br><b>To Episode:</b> ",
    transition_lines$next_merged_episode_id,

    "<br><b>To Site:</b> ",
    transition_lines$next_state,

    "<br><b>To Type:</b> ",
    transition_lines$next_episode_type,

    "<br><b>Next Start:</b> ",
    transition_lines$next_start_time
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build corrected within-episode lines
# ------------------------------------------------------------

episode_line_geom <-
  st_sfc(
    lapply(
      seq_len(nrow(episodes_df)),
      function(i) {
        st_linestring(
          matrix(
            c(
              start_coords[i, "X"],
              start_coords[i, "Y"],
              end_coords[i, "X"],
              end_coords[i, "Y"]
            ),
            ncol = 2,
            byrow = TRUE
          )
        )
      }
    ),
    crs = 32610
  )

episode_lines <-
  st_sf(
    episodes_df,
    geometry = episode_line_geom
  ) |>
  st_transform(
    4326
  )

episode_starts <-
  episode_starts_32610 |>
  st_transform(
    4326
  )

episode_ends <-
  episode_ends_32610 |>
  st_transform(
    4326
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Popup text
# ------------------------------------------------------------

episode_lines$popup_text <-
  paste0(
    "<b>Tag:</b> ",
    episode_lines$tag_id,

    "<br><b>Sex:</b> ",
    episode_lines$Sex,

    "<br><b>Tag Site:</b> ",
    episode_lines$TagSiteName,

    "<br><b>Episode Site:</b> ",
    episode_lines$state,

    "<br><b>Episode Type:</b> ",
    episode_lines$episode_type,

    "<br><b>Behavior:</b> ",
    episode_lines$behavior_type,

    "<br><b>Duration min:</b> ",
    round(
      episode_lines$duration_min,
      1
    ),

    "<br><b>Detections:</b> ",
    episode_lines$n_detections,

    "<br><b>Start:</b> ",
    episode_lines$start_time,

    "<br><b>End:</b> ",
    episode_lines$end_time
  )

episode_starts$popup_text <-
  paste0(
    "<b>Start Point</b>",
    "<br><b>Tag:</b> ",
    episode_starts$tag_id,

    "<br><b>Sex:</b> ",
    episode_starts$Sex,

    "<br><b>Tag Site:</b> ",
    episode_starts$TagSiteName,

    "<br><b>Episode Site:</b> ",
    episode_starts$state,

    "<br><b>Episode Type:</b> ",
    episode_starts$episode_type,

    "<br><b>Behavior:</b> ",
    episode_starts$behavior_type,

    "<br><b>Duration min:</b> ",
    round(
      episode_starts$duration_min,
      1
    ),

    "<br><b>Detections:</b> ",
    episode_starts$n_detections,

    "<br><b>Start:</b> ",
    episode_starts$start_time
  )

episode_ends$popup_text <-
  paste0(
    "<b>End Point</b>",
    "<br><b>Tag:</b> ",
    episode_ends$tag_id,

    "<br><b>Sex:</b> ",
    episode_ends$Sex,

    "<br><b>Tag Site:</b> ",
    episode_ends$TagSiteName,

    "<br><b>Episode Site:</b> ",
    episode_ends$state,

    "<br><b>Episode Type:</b> ",
    episode_ends$episode_type,

    "<br><b>Behavior:</b> ",
    episode_ends$behavior_type,

    "<br><b>Duration min:</b> ",
    round(
      episode_ends$duration_min,
      1
    ),

    "<br><b>Detections:</b> ",
    episode_ends$n_detections,

    "<br><b>End:</b> ",
    episode_ends$end_time
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Hover labels
# ------------------------------------------------------------
episode_starts$label_text <-
  paste0(
    "START | ",
    episode_starts$tag_id,
    " | ",
    episode_starts$episode_type,
    " | detections: ",
    episode_starts$n_detections
  )

episode_ends$label_text <-
  paste0(
    "END | ",
    episode_ends$tag_id,
    " | ",
    episode_ends$episode_type,
    " | detections: ",
    episode_ends$n_detections
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Map-ready episode lines
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Exclude episodes without behavior type so they do not appear
# as an NA category in the line layer or legend.

episode_lines_map <-
  episode_lines[
    !is.na(episode_lines$behavior_type),
  ]

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

tag_ids <-
  readRDS("data/episodes.rds") |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  pull(tag_id) |>
  unique() |>
  sort()

options_html <- paste(
  sapply(
    tag_ids,
    function(x) {
      selected <- if(x == selected_tag) "selected" else ""
      paste0(
        "<option value='episodes_",
        x,
        ".html' ",
        selected,
        ">",
        x,
        "</option>"
      )
    }
  ),
  collapse = ""
)

cat(
  paste0(
    "<div style='margin-bottom:15px;'>",
    "<label><b>Select Tag:</b></label><br>",
    "<select onchange=\"window.location=this.value\">",
    options_html,
    "</select>",
    "</div>"
  )
)
```

### Tag: `r selected_tag`

Interactive map of detection episodes or consecutive detections inside or outside of a overwintering site boundary.
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

m <- leaflet(
  width = "100%",
  height = "600px",
  options =
    leafletOptions(
      preferCanvas = TRUE
    )
) |>

  addProviderTiles(
    providers$Esri.WorldTopoMap
  ) |>

  addPolygons(
    data = boundary102,
    fillColor =
      ~site_status_pal(
        SiteStatus_map
      ),
    fillOpacity = 0.35,
    color =
      ~site_status_pal(
        SiteStatus_map
      ),
    weight = 2,
    opacity = 0.9,
    popup =
      ~paste0(
        "<b>Site:</b> ",
        SiteName,
        "<br><b>Status:</b> ",
        SiteStatus_map
      )
  ) |>

  addPolylines(
    data = episode_lines_map,
    color =
      ~behavior_pal(
        behavior_type
      ),
    weight = 2,
    opacity = 0.8,
    popup =
      ~popup_text
  ) |>

  addPolylines(
    data = transition_lines,
    color = "#4D4D4D",
    weight = 1.6,
    opacity = 0.42,
    dashArray = "4,6",
    popup =
      ~popup_text
  ) |>

  # Start points: solid circles
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = episode_starts,
    radius = 3,
    stroke = TRUE,
    weight = 1,
    color = "black",
    fillColor =
      ~episode_type_pal(
        episode_type
      ),
    fillOpacity = 0.85,
    popup =
      ~popup_text,
    label =
      ~label_text
  ) |>

  # End points: outer colored circles
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = episode_ends,
    radius = 4,
    stroke = TRUE,
    weight = 1,
    color = "black",
    fillColor =
      ~episode_type_pal(
        episode_type
      ),
    fillOpacity = 0.85,
    popup =
      ~popup_text,
    label =
      ~label_text
  ) |>

  # End points: small black inset dot
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = episode_ends,
    radius = 1,
    stroke = FALSE,
    fillColor = "black",
    fillOpacity = 1,
    popup =
      ~popup_text,
    label =
      ~label_text
  ) |>

  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    pal = behavior_pal,
    values = episode_lines_map$behavior_type,
    title = "Behavior Type",
    opacity = 1
  ) |>

  addLegend(
    position = "topleft",
    pal = site_status_pal,
    values = c(
      "Active",
      "Other"
    ),
    title = "Site Status",
    opacity = 1
  ) |>

  addControl(
    html =
      htmltools::HTML(
        paste0(
          "<div style='",
          "background: white;",
          "padding: 8px 10px;",
          "border-radius: 4px;",
          "box-shadow: 0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);",
          "font-size: 14px;",
          "line-height: 18px;",
          "'>",
          "<div style='font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 4px;'>Episode Type</div>",

          "<div>",
          "<span style='",
          "display: inline-block;",
          "width: 10px;",
          "height: 10px;",
          "border-radius: 50%;",
          "background: #E41A1C;",
          "border: 1px solid black;",
          "margin-right: 6px;",
          "'></span>",
          "foray",
          "</div>",

          "<div>",
          "<span style='",
          "display: inline-block;",
          "width: 10px;",
          "height: 10px;",
          "border-radius: 50%;",
          "background: #984EA3;",
          "border: 1px solid black;",
          "margin-right: 6px;",
          "'></span>",
          "visit",
          "</div>",

          "</div>"
        )
      ),
    position = "bottomleft"
  )

m

```
